meaning: adj.未剃须的,未修面的,未刮脸的
examples: I've been lying to you in increasing amounts ever since I told you you looked good unshaved, a year ago.
It's common in some Buddhist cultures to shave children's heads, often leaving a small unshaved tuft above the forehead.
Doctors at the outpatient clinic said the man was unshaved and casually dressed when he showed up, with a friendly and enthusiastic attitude.
